name: specialists-lifehub
description: Domain plugin for life-hub-style repos (a personal information hub / brain-based knowledge repo): the subagents Astrid, Fiona, Hugo, Ian, and Onyx. Deliberately NOT repo-neutral — only a life-hub-style repo enables this plugin. The governance layer (CLAUDE.md + .claude/manuals/*) and the shared core (plugin 'specialists') stay separate.
